ground_truth.title: Official Website of Sadhguru, Isha Foundation | India
ground_truth.main_content: Welcome to the official website of Isha Foundation, a non-profit spiritual organization founded and guided by Sadhguru Jaggi Vasudev. The website features sections exploring Sadhguru as a man, mystic, and his mission. Technologies for Wellbeing include meditation techniques, Sadhguru's knowledge, volunteering opportunities, and consecrated spaces like the Dhyanalinga temple. Latest wisdom content includes video discussions on science and spirituality exploring consciousness and psychic phenomena, as well as warnings about attempting Kundalini Yoga without proper guidance. The site offers programs for yoga and meditation, health solutions, residential and non-residential programs, and various events including monthly gatherings and annual celebrations like Mahashivratri and Guru Purnima. Visitors can subscribe to receive Sadhguru's daily quote via email and explore Inner Engineering programs for personal transformation.
with: On 14 October 2025, Sadhguru Center for a Conscious Planet hosted a conversation between Dr. Dean Radin, Chief Scientist at the Institute of Noetic Sciences, and Sadhguru in Boston, USA, titled 'Science and Spirituality.'
Sadhguru speaks about an ancient tantric ritual practiced in Central Asia where they make a seed grow into a tree and bear fruit in a matter of hours.
Learn Proven Techniques and Practices, Explore Sadhguru's Knowledge, Take Part in Volunteering, Experience Powerfully Consecrated Spaces.

Isha Foundation is a non-profit spiritual organization founded & guided by Sadhguru Jaggi Vasudev. It focuses on human empowerment and social revitalization through yoga & meditation programs to attain spiritual wellbeing.
Receive Sadhguru's quote every day in your inbox.
